name: Idle Gameplay
description:
“Life calls louder than work.”

[ Someone Living]

.

---

What happens when laziness meets a philosophy? A philosophy that life is better spent living than working? It makes an excuse, but it’s this excuse that justifies Hunnit’s fear of working to some extent. For a roommate that is unemployed and idle, work is taboo and makes life blue. But as for you, what do you have to say for this dude?
